title: Lucky Blocks
description: This mod adds Lucky Blocks. That's it...
body:
This mod adds Lucky Blocks into the game. These lucky blocks fit nicely into your survival worlds. You can get these lucky blocks by crafting them. These are the crafting recipes: 

![Gold Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed7d36495ee88763f3510e9cbae1d35b491ff4d6.png)

![Diamond Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60e0de1a19b38f418bb4c023ab56c823bb52c54b.png)

![Iron Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dab2136e44cc5f285db905239474a3ed66de174.png)

![Coal Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1a0c10879107b2c684235846b4ce7c4ba7e65ce.png)

![Lapis Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/935a74bf989b70dad2c1e19bf0c0d38a5b73e566.png)

![Emerald Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05959c6a21ffa8dec90d8ac28bc0b51956d06387.png)

![Redstone Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3b68aad866e36ff86171c56cf3a97d05cc6b9c9.png)

![Netherite Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c396fc507515c93f99e275fc0f671fcc0f27966.png)

![Random Lucky Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3df4eb4b2d9887ef0fd98985417ace73961191a5.png)

# How to install _(prism launcher)_
1. Go to [https://prismlauncher.org](https://prismlauncher.org/) then download and install the launcher.
2. Open the launcher
3. Create a new instance (Right click > Create instance)
4. Select version **1.20.1**
5. Select the mod loader Forge
6. Click "Ok"
7. Click "Edit"
8. Click "Mods"
9. Click "Download mods"
10. Search LuckyBlocks
11. Select this mod
12. Click "Select mod for download"
13. Click "Review and confirm"
14. Finaly click "Launch"
15. Thats it!

![TL;DR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2fa4dacf1d52f70d2bb4afb88d0b3e1d81849f8.png)
